introSection:
Crazy Mine is a travelling steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster built by French manufacturer Reverchon currently owned and travelled by German showman Thilo Janßen.

Formerly named Crazy Mouse, it was refurbished and renamed in 2024.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Pink track and green supports, used to have yellow track with blue supports.

fullText:
Crazy Mine is a travelling steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster built by French manufacturer Reverchon currently owned and travelled by German showman Thilo Janßen.

Formerly named Crazy Mouse, it was refurbished and renamed in 2024.



Pink track and green supports, used to have yellow track with blue supports.
